allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path })
Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db=require\('./src/pool'\); db.query\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM carbon_readings'\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows[0].c\); process.exit\(0\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db=require\('./src/pool'\); db.query\('SELECT count\(*\) c, count\(distinct entry_date\) d FROM carbon_readings'\).then\(r=>{console.log\('rows:', r.rows[0].c, 'distinct dates:', r.rows[0].d\); process.exit\(0\);}\)")
